summary: Completed regression testing after audio button bug fix. All backend APIs working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend landing page, login, registration pages, help center, and language selector all functioning properly. Audio button fix verified - button correctly transitions between states (green 'Listen' → loading → yellow 'Stop' → green 'Listen').
passed_tests: Landing page: Language selector visible and functional
Landing page: User signup button visible
Landing page: Driver signup button visible
Landing page: Voiceover button visible and clickable
Landing page: Audio button state transitions work correctly
Help Center: FAQ tab visible with categories (Abonnements, Trajets, Compte)
Help Center: AI Assistant tab visible
Login page: Form loads correctly with Email and Password fields
User registration page: Form loads correctly
Driver registration page: Form loads correctly with region selection
Language switching: English/French toggle works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Audio button bug fix verified: Removed undefined variables audioReady and audioProgress
Button now correctly uses only audioPlaying and audioLoading states
All 3 regions (Paris, Lyon, London) are properly seeded in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression testing completed after audio button bug fix. All core functionality verified: landing page, login, registration (user/driver), help center, language selector, and audio voiceover button. Backend APIs for regions, subscriptions, and auth all working. Stripe is in LIVE mode - do not test real payments.
